name: lumen-native
description: Lumen-owned native backend: emit.lm (Lumen IR->C translator), optimize.lm, the diff harness, and the disposable driver.
_wabtNote: wabt is retained ONLY for the two documented R5 wasm exceptions that live in this directory: fuel_build.mjs (one-time fuel-instrumented .wat rebuild) and pipeline.mjs's lazy emit_llvm.lm path (no native bootstrap exists for the LLVM emitter yet). No other package.json in the repo needs it; do not add it elsewhere.
